summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: You came back cleaner than the short night earned — the sleep ran thin on hours, but your body still settled into it and pulled real recovery out of the dark. There's steadiness under you this morning, the regulated kind you tend to rebuild through rather than big swings. Knees and joints are quiet, nothing flagging — you're starting the day from a position of strength, not depletion.

Performance: Push hard. You're regulated and sitting a touch above your normal baseline despite the short sleep, so today's a green light to load up and go after real output — just keep your form honest if you reach for heavy.

Transit: none
